description: Trading System Features - Active trades monitoring, signal approval/rejection, trade history, execution logs, and performance metrics with evolution context

userStories.title: Update ActiveTradesTable to use real API data
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see all my active trades with real-time updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Update EnhancedActiveTradesTable to fetch from GET /trades/active
Display entry price, current price, P&L
Display stop loss and take profit levels
Display evolved features used as badges
Display confidence score as progress bar
Color-code P&L (green for profit, red for loss)
Add visual flash effect when price updates via WebSocket
Add trade detail view modal on row click
Verify in browser that active trades display correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented useActiveTrades hook with API integration, WebSocket real-time updates with flash effect, loading skeleton, error state with retry, and TradeDetailModal component.

userStories.title: Update PendingSignals with approve/reject actions
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to approve or reject pending trading signals.
acceptanceCriteria: Update PendingSignals to fetch from GET /trades/pending-signals
Display signal ID, symbol, signal type (STRONG_BUY, BUY, SELL, STRONG_SELL)
Display evolved features used as badges
Add Approve All button with confirmation dialog
Add Reject All button with confirmation dialog
Remove signal from list after action
Add sort by confidence or time
Verify in browser that signal approval works
userStories.notes: Implemented usePendingSignals hook with API integration, approved/reject actions with toast notifications, filter by symbol, sort by confidence/time, loading skeleton, and error state with retry.

userStories.title: Update RecentTrades with real trade history
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my recent closed trades.
acceptanceCriteria: Update RecentTrades to fetch from GET /trades/recent
Display final P&L with color coding
Display entry time, exit time, duration
Display stop loss, take profit, if hit
Add trade detail modal on row click
Verify in browser that recent trades display correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented comprehensive RecentTrades component with all acceptance criteria met. Created ClosedTrade type in evolution.ts with all required fields (ticket, symbol, side, entry/exit prices, pnl, pnlPercent, stopLoss, takeProfit, stopLossHit, takeProfitHit, entry/exit times, duration, HTF/LTF context, featuresUsed, confidence, generation). Created useRecentTrades hook with API integration for GET /trades/recent endpoint, supporting filters (symbol, outcome, dateRange, searchTicket), pagination (20 per page), loading states, and error handling. Completely rewrote RecentTrades component as self-contained with no props - fetches own data via useRecentTrades hook. Added filter by symbol dropdown (populated dynamically from trades), filter by outcome dropdown (all/profit/loss), date range selector (today/week/month/all), search by ticket ID with 300ms debounce, export to CSV button with current filtered data, trade detail modal on row click using TradeDetailModal, pagination controls with page navigation. Shows ticket ID, symbol, side badge, entry/exit prices, final P&L with color coding (green profit, red loss), entry/exit times, duration, SL/TP levels with hit indicators (visual exclamation mark), HTF/LTF context, evolved features as badges (with +n overflow), confidence score as progress bar. Added professional loading skeleton with header, filters, and table row skeletons. Added error state with AlertCircle icon, descriptive message, and retry button. Updated TradeDetailModal to support both EvolvedTrade and ClosedTrade types - displays exit price/time for closed trades, shows SL/TP hit indicators, and hides Close Trade button for closed trades. Updated page.tsx to use RecentTrades without props. Typecheck passes. Build succeeds.

userStories.title: Update ExecutionLog with real-time logs
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see trade execution logs in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: Update ExecutionLog to fetch from GET /trades/execution-log
Display timestamp, event type (info, warning, error, success)
Display trade ticket associated with event
Color-code by event type (blue=info, yellow=warning, red=error, green=success)
Add filter by event type checkboxes
Subscribe to trade_update WebSocket events for new logs
Verify in browser that execution logs display correctly
userStories.notes: Implemented comprehensive ExecutionLog component with real-time updates. Added ExecutionLogLevel and ExecutionLogEntry types to evolution.ts. Created useExecutionLog hook with API integration for GET /trades/execution-log endpoint, supporting filters (eventTypes, symbol, ticket), pause/resume functionality, clear logs, export to CSV, and auto-refresh every 10 seconds. Subscribes to WebSocket events: trade_update, mt5_order_opened, mt5_order_closed, mt5_position_modified, mt5_error, mt5_connected, mt5_disconnected - converting each to appropriate log entries. Completely rewrote ExecutionLog component with no props - fetches own data via useExecutionLog hook. Added ExecutionLogSkeleton and ExecutionLogError sub-components. Shows timestamp, event level badge, message, ticket ID badge, and expandable details JSON. Color-codes events (blue=info, yellow=warning, red=error, green=success). Added filter panel with event type checkboxes (Info, Success, Warning, Error), symbol filter (V10, V25, V50, V75, V100), and ticket ID search input. Added pause/resume button with visual indicator badge, clear logs button, export to CSV button, and refresh button. Displays log count and last updated timestamp. Limits logs to 500 entries max to prevent memory issues. Typecheck passes. Build succeeds.

acceptanceCriteria: Display all trade information (ticket, symbol, side, lots)

Display evolved features used with success rates
Add X button to close modal
Verify in browser that modal displays correctly

userStories.title: Create TradeStatisticsSummary component
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to see my trading performance summary.

userStories.title: Integrate real-time WebSocket updates into trading components
userStories.description: As a trader, I need real-time updates without refreshing.
acceptanceCriteria: Subscribe to trade_update WebSocket events in ActiveTradesTable
Update trade P&L in real-time when trade_update received
Add flash animation to updated rows
Subscribe to new_signal WebSocket events in PendingSignals
Add new signal to top of list when received
Show toast notification for new signal
Subscribe to execution_log events in ExecutionLog
Verify in browser that real-time updates work
